_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model monitoring approaches, including prediction drift detection, input data distribution monitoring, and latency and throughput tracking.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Knowledge AI-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-024 (AI, cosine: 0.543), AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.514).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.591). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, monitoring]. NICE-only terms [continuous, processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [approaches, data, detection, distribution, drift, input] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.909 (P=0.937, R=0.882). P exceeds R by 0.054 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Knowledge of continuous monitoring processes" and "Knowledge of model monitoring approaches, including prediction drift detection," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.579 ≈ STS 0.591 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, monitoring] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, monitoring]. NICE-only: [continuous, processes]. WIDAI-only: [approaches, data, detection, distribution, drift, input].
